description: UI launchers for build-all and gsd. The cockpit can start a single build but has no trigger for `compose build --all` (build every PLANNED feature) or `compose gsd <CODE>` (per-task fresh-context dispatch); both are CLI/headless-only. Add cockpit controls reusing the existing build-start dispatch so a UI-first user can run a roadmap-wide or GSD build.

completions.notes: build-all / gsd launchers (mode:'all'/'gsd'); launcher conflicts → 409. Shipped in parity batch.
